project: MatFlow — Phase A (super-admin impersonation) then Phase B (RLS hardening)
scope: Plan file: C:\Users\NoeTo\.claude\plans\does-my-code-have-mossy-wand.md. Phase A first (impersonation built on existing app-layer isolation, no new risk vs current production). Then Phase B (wrap dashboard bare-prisma in withTenantContext, ALTER ROLE neondb_owner NOBYPASSRLS, re-probe). Each phase is its own commit on branch feat/kiosk-admin-name. Reuse existing helpers (lib/kiosk-token.ts, lib/login-event.ts, lib/admin-auth.ts, lib/audit-log.ts, lib/prisma-tenant.ts).

stories.title: lib/impersonation.ts — sign/verify/cookie helpers
acceptanceCriteria: New file lib/impersonation.ts exports: signImpersonationToken({adminUserId, targetUserId, targetTenantId, reason}), verifyImpersonationToken(raw) returning {ok, payload | reason}, setImpersonationCookie(payload), readImpersonationCookie() returning verified payload or null, clearImpersonationCookie()
HMAC-SHA256 signature with AUTH_SECRET_VALUE (mirrors lib/kiosk-token.ts shape)
60-min TTL encoded in payload.exp
Verifier uses timingSafeEqual
Cookie name: matflow_impersonation, httpOnly, secure, sameSite=lax, maxAge=60*60
npx tsc --noEmit clean for the new file

stories.title: lib/audit-log.ts — extend with optional actAsUserId argument
acceptanceCriteria: logAudit() signature accepts optional actAsUserId?: string | null
When set, persisted as metadata.actingAs
All existing call sites continue to compile (signature is purely additive)
npx tsc --noEmit clean

stories.title: app/api/admin/impersonate/route.ts — POST start + DELETE end
acceptanceCriteria: POST: requires isAdminAuthed(req); rate-limited admin:impersonate:{ip} 30/h; body validated as { targetUserId: string, reason: string min 5 chars }
POST: looks up target user via withRlsBypass to get tenantId + sessionVersion; returns 404 if not found
POST: mints impersonation cookie via signImpersonationToken + setImpersonationCookie
POST: audits action 'admin.impersonate.start' with userId: targetUserId and metadata: { reason, targetTenantId }
POST: returns { ok: true, redirectTo: '/dashboard' }
DELETE: reads impersonation cookie; if valid, audits 'admin.impersonate.end'; clears cookie; returns { ok: true, redirectTo: '/admin/tenants' }
npx tsc --noEmit clean

stories.title: auth.ts jwt() + session() callbacks — token override on impersonation
acceptanceCriteria: jwt() callback in non-user-refresh branch (after demo upgrade, before sessionVersion check) reads impersonation cookie via readImpersonationCookie()
If valid: fetches target user from prisma (within withRlsBypass), confirms target.tenantId === payload.targetTenantId

Atomically overrides token fields: id, tenantId, tenantSlug, tenantName, primaryColor, secondaryColor, textColor, role, sessionVersion, memberId=null, totpPending=false, requireTotpSetup=false, brandFetchedAt
Stamps token.impersonatedBy = adminUserId and token.impersonationReason = reason
session() callback propagates impersonatedBy + impersonationReason to session.user when present
Existing sessionVersion check at line ~536 now validates against TARGET's sessionVersion (correct: if target disowned, kills impersonation)
Existing brand-refresh logic uses overridden tenantId (correct)
npx tsc --noEmit clean for auth.ts

stories.title: ImpersonationBanner + dashboard layout integration
acceptanceCriteria: New components/layout/ImpersonationBanner.tsx is a server component that reads impersonation cookie via cookies() from next/headers
If active: renders fixed-position red banner across top with: target name, tenant name, expiry time, reason, 'End impersonation' button (form POST to /api/admin/impersonate with _method=DELETE)
If not active: renders nothing
app/dashboard/layout.tsx renders <ImpersonationBanner /> above the existing layout
Banner does NOT break the existing layout structure (minimal CSS impact; offset via padding-top adjustment if needed)
npx tsc --noEmit clean

stories.title: /admin/tenants list + [id] detail page with Login-as-owner button
acceptanceCriteria: New app/admin/tenants/page.tsx: server component listing all Tenant rows (id, name, slug, owner email, member count, status, createdAt)
Each row has a 'View' link to /admin/tenants/[id]
Owner-secret-gated by existing proxy.ts admin gate (no extra auth code needed)
New app/admin/tenants/[id]/page.tsx: shows tenant detail (name, slug, owner profile, member count, Stripe status), with 'Login as [owner name]' button
Click button → modal with required typed reason textarea (min 5 chars) → Submit → POST /api/admin/impersonate → on success: window.location = '/dashboard'
/admin/applications page links to /admin/tenants in its header for navigation
npx tsc --noEmit clean

stories.title: Phase A typecheck + commit + push
acceptanceCriteria: npx tsc --noEmit exits 0 across the whole repo
git commit with subject 'feat(admin): super-admin impersonation feature'
Body lists: PA-001..PA-006, security properties, audit-log integration, banner, /admin/tenants pages
git push to origin feat/kiosk-admin-name succeeds

stories.title: Wrap all bare-prisma server-component calls in withTenantContext
acceptanceCriteria: All 13 dashboard/member server-component files identified by lane-1 grep are wrapped: app/dashboard/{members,attendance,checkin,page,layout,timetable,settings,memberships,notifications,ranks,analysis}/page.tsx, app/dashboard/members/[id]/{page,waiver/page}.tsx, app/onboarding/page.tsx, app/member/family/[childId]/page.tsx, app/member/purchase/pack/[id]/page.tsx
Each replaces 'await prisma.X.findMany/findFirst/findUnique({ where: { tenantId, ... } })' with 'await withTenantContext(tenantId, (tx) => tx.X.find...({ where: { tenantId, ... } }))'
WHERE clauses with tenantId stay (defense-in-depth — both filter)
Imports: replace 'import { prisma } from @/lib/prisma' with 'import { withTenantContext } from @/lib/prisma-tenant' where appropriate
No business logic changes
npx tsc --noEmit exits 0
npm run build exits 0 OR documents any pre-existing build issues unrelated to this change

stories.title: One-shot script: ALTER ROLE neondb_owner NOBYPASSRLS
acceptanceCriteria: New scripts/revoke-bypassrls.mjs runs 'ALTER ROLE neondb_owner NOBYPASSRLS' against the live DB via Prisma's executeRaw
Script logs the role state before AND after (BYPASSRLS=true → BYPASSRLS=false expected)
Script is idempotent (running twice succeeds)
Script run successfully — verify by re-reading pg_roles.rolbypassrls

stories.title: Re-run probe to confirm RLS now denies uncontexted queries
acceptanceCriteria: scripts/probe-rls-uncontexted.mjs re-run AFTER NOBYPASSRLS
Step 2 (uncontexted count) returns 0 (was returning 13 before)
Step 3 (wrong-context count) returns 0 (was returning 13 before)
Verdict line says SAFE for both checks
Output captured in progress.txt for the record

stories.title: Manual smoke-test of dashboard pages still render with RLS active
acceptanceCriteria: After NOBYPASSRLS: hit /dashboard/members on dev server → page renders the actual member list (not empty)
Hit /dashboard/attendance → page renders the attendance log
Hit /dashboard/checkin → page renders today's classes + members
Confirm by checking that withTenantContext successfully sets the GUC and queries return rows
If any page shows empty unexpectedly: that file's bare-prisma wrap was missed; fix and re-test

stories.title: Phase B typecheck + commit + push
acceptanceCriteria: npx tsc --noEmit exits 0
git commit with subject 'security: enforce RLS by wrapping bare-prisma + revoking BYPASSRLS'
Body explains: discovery, app-layer isolation was the de facto guarantee, RLS now active as belt-and-braces, lists every file modified
git push to origin feat/kiosk-admin-name succeeds
